entry.data:
MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 80S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
